latest.title: Butterflies taste with their feet
latest.script_key: watch their feet see how it taps the leaf that s not resting that s tasting butterflies taste flowers with sensors on their feet not their mouths that s why they land before they sip did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Elephants cool blood through giant ears
latest.script_key: elephants use their ears as living radiators watch the ear surface because warm blood flows through those broad veins moving air can dump heat before it spreads through the body that is why the ears are more than decoration in hot places which giant animal trick next

latest.title: Sheep recognize faces across the flock
latest.script_key: sheep can remember familiar faces watch the face and spacing because sheep can learn who is familiar in the flock that recognition helps them stay near safe partners and avoid stress the group is not just a blur to them which farm animal should we compare next

latest.title: What a dog's tail says before the bark that most people miss
latest.script_key: a dog s tail is a signal not a simple happiness meter watch the first second the body pauses then the tail gives the clue in this clip the recovery angle is adorable golden retriever puppy most viewers watch the face but the useful signal is smaller that visible cue is the whole story so the short opens on the dog instead of stretching the setup that small detail gives the video a reason to exist
